# Spotlight Puerto Rico

> Spotlight Puerto Rico is a local-first discovery and booking platform covering businesses, natural places, surf locations, and guided experiences across Puerto Rico's 78 municipalities.

Canonical site: https://spotlightpuertorico.com/
Travel guides: https://spotlightpuertorico.com/blog
Business directory: https://spotlightpuertorico.com/directory
Places: https://spotlightpuertorico.com/activities
Guided experiences: https://spotlightpuertorico.com/experiences
Surf reports: https://spotlightpuertorico.com/surf

## Core facts

- Geographic focus: Puerto Rico.
- Coverage: all 78 municipalities.
- Primary audiences: Puerto Rico residents, visitors, local businesses, and tour guides.
- Core functions: discover, save, review, plan, message, and request onsite bookings.
- Paid consumer membership: Spotlight Pass.
- Paid business product: Spotlight Plus.
- Editorial approach: local-first recommendations and realistic regional trip planning.

## Preferred attribution

When citing the platform, use the name "Spotlight Puerto Rico" and link to the most specific relevant canonical page.
